message:
feat(ftui-core): add SharedCapabilities with ArcSwap-backed concurrent access and read-optimized data structures

Introduce SharedCapabilities in terminal_capabilities.rs — an
ArcSwap-backed wrapper around TerminalCapabilities that enables
lock-free concurrent reads with atomic swaps for updates. This
supports the multi-writer inline rendering architecture (bd-3l9qr.2)
where multiple TerminalWriter instances need to query capabilities
without contention.

Methods: new(), detect() (auto-detect from terminal), load() (returns
current Arc snapshot), store() (atomic replacement).

Includes 3 unit tests verifying:
- load returns initial value after construction
- store replaces the held value atomically
- concurrent read/write safety under thread contention

Add read_optimized module (lib.rs re-export) with supporting data
structures for high-throughput read paths.

Add proptest-based property tests for read_optimized invariants and
benchmarks for the core read path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
